reasons.title: Strategic Downtown Location
reasons.description: The project features a rare infill downtown location in the fast-growing Cathedral City, offering a prime pedestrian-oriented environment near major arterial roads.

reasons.title: High Demand Market
reasons.description: Cathedral City boasts a tight rental market with a 2.4% vacancy rate and a population of over 52,000, signaling high demand for new multi-family housing.

reasons.title: Major Economic Drivers
reasons.description: The property is adjacent to the new Agua Caliente Casino, which created over 500 jobs, and is surrounded by new retail developments including Starbucks and Chipotle.

summary.quote: THE JASPER is a one-of-a-kind opportunity to acquire 19 Multi-Family Units currently under construction with an infill downtown location in fast-growing Cathedral City.
paragraphs: "THE JASPER" is a one-of-a-kind opportunity to acquire 19 Multi-Family Units (currently under construction and estimated to be completed in March 2026) with an infill downtown location in fast-growing Cathedral City, which is currently experiencing a major development renaissance. This well-located property is off of the main arterial road "Hwy. 111/East Palm Canyon Drive" and is nearby the newly constructed and opened "Agua Caliente Casino" which created over 500 new jobs, with over 500 new slot/gaming machines & table games, and several new restaurants.

Cathedral City is located between Palm Springs and Rancho Mirage, and is the second largest city in the Coachella Valley with a population of over 52,000 people. The Coachella Valley residential and hospitality market have boomed since the pandemic, and continued appreciation can be captured by acquiring one of the best new infill projects in the downtown area of Cathedral City, and near the City of Palm Springs. Other amenities and points of interest in downtown Cathedral City include the CV Repertory Performing Arts Theater, The Heritage Commons Amphitheater, and the Mary Pickford Movie Theatre.
summary.conclusion: This project is truly a prime pedestrian-oriented development located within a Qualified Opportunity Zone, offering significant potential for appreciation and capital gains tax savings.

cards.title: How Investors Participate
cards.summary: This offering is structured for a close upon construction completion, providing a turnkey acquisition opportunity for brand-new multi-family units in a high-growth corridor.

cards.title: Property Overview
cards.summary: The Jasper consists of 19 high-quality units with diverse floor plans, designed to cater to the modern residential demand in the heart of Cathedral City's downtown renaissance.

cards.title: Market Analysis
cards.summary: Cathedral City is the second largest city in the Coachella Valley and has seen a post-pandemic boom in residential demand, underpinned by significant retail and entertainment investment.

cards.title: Sponsor Profile
cards.summary: The Hoffman Company is a leading real estate brokerage and advisory firm with deep expertise in land and multi-family developments throughout the Coachella Valley and Riverside County.

financialReturns.pageSubtitle: Detailed financial projections and investment structure

projections.label: Cap Rate
projections.description: The going-in capitalization rate based on projected Net Operating Income.

projections.label: Cap Rate (OZ Adjusted)
projections.description: The projected capitalization rate when accounting for estimated Opportunity Zone tax benefits.

projections.label: Projected OZ Tax Savings
projections.description: Estimated total tax savings over a 10-year hold period assuming $10.95M initial investment.

projections.label: Net Operating Income (NOI)
projections.description: The total annual income after 28% operating expenses and vacancy are deducted.

projections.label: Gross Annual Income
projections.description: The total yearly revenue generated from units, storage, and garage income.

projections.label: Market Rental Vacancy
projections.description: Current rental vacancy rate for the Cathedral City market area.

uses.description: Acquisition of 19-unit multi-family building upon completion

timeline.description: Construction phase with estimated completion in March 2026. Phase includes close of escrow upon build completion.
Lease-up and stabilization of the 19 units, storage facilities, and extra garage.
Exit strategy aligned with Opportunity Zone requirements to maximize capital gains tax exemptions on appreciation.

benefits.title: Capital Gains Deferral
benefits.description: Deferral of federal taxes on existing capital gains invested into the project.

benefits.title: Basis Step-Up
benefits.description: Potential for basis adjustments on the original investment over the holding period.

benefits.title: Tax-Free Growth (10-Year Hold)
benefits.description: Elimination of capital gains tax on any appreciation of the Jasper property if held for at least 10 years.

structure.label: Distribution Frequency
structure.value: Buyer to confirm with sponsor (not specified in OM)

amenities.name: Rooftop solar PV (~65 kW DC per plans)

specialFeatures.description: Units feature south-facing window shading, tankless water heaters, high-efficiency Whirlpool appliances, and private balconies (select units).

highlights.title: Agua Caliente Casino Proximity
highlights.description: Nearby the newly opened casino which created over 500 new jobs.

highlights.title: Arts & Entertainment District
highlights.description: Walking distance to downtown theaters, restaurants, and civic center.

highlights.title: Qualified Opportunity Zone
highlights.description: Located within a state Qualified Opportunity Zone for capital gains tax savings.

phases.features: 19-unit residential apartment building with ~65 kW DC rooftop solar (per plans) and site improvements.

marketAnalysis.pageSubtitle: Local economic drivers and competitive landscape

metrics.label: Rental Vacancy Rate
metrics.description: Extremely tight market conditions indicating high demand for rental housing.

metrics.label: Annual Growth Rate
metrics.description: Growth rate reflecting a city that is mostly built out.

metrics.label: Home Price Appreciation
metrics.description: The rate of home value increases year-over-year in the local market.

metrics.label: Avg. Household Income
metrics.description: Mean income for households in the submarket.

demographics.description: The median age of residents in Cathedral City.
The mean income per household in the market.
Educational attainment in the market area (Not explicitly stated in text).

drivers.title: Downtown Renaissance
drivers.description: The city is undergoing a major development renaissance, transforming the central plaza area into a vibrant hub with theaters, an amphitheater, and first-class restaurants.

drivers.title: Casino Job Catalyst
drivers.description: The newly opened Agua Caliente Casino created over 500 new jobs and acts as a major economic anchor for the immediate downtown vicinity.

drivers.title: Regional Market Growth
drivers.description: The market is benefiting from a post-pandemic residential and hospitality boom throughout the Coachella Valley, characterized by continued property appreciation.

drivers.title: Opportunity Zone Status
drivers.description: The project's location within a state Qualified Opportunity Zone provides rare tax-advantaged investment potential in a high-demand infill area.

analysis.title: Low Vacancy Environment
analysis.description: Rental vacancy is extremely low at 2.4%, signaling a critical need for new inventory in the submarket.

analysis.title: Permit Activity
analysis.description: The city issued a near-record number of building permits in 2022, though growth is constrained as the city is mostly built out.

analysis.title: Residential Pipeline
analysis.description: Over 470 new single-family homes are currently planned or under construction across projects like Rio del Sol, Campanile, and Mountain View Estates.

sectors.title: Accommodations & Food Service
sectors.description: The largest employment sector in the city, representing 14.01% of the workforce.

sectors.title: Healthcare & Social Assistance
sectors.description: A major employment pillar accounting for 12.84% of local jobs.

sectors.title: Retail Trade
sectors.description: Significant local employment sector making up 12.01% of the market.

paragraphs: The Hoffman Company is a specialized real estate firm with a significant presence in the Coachella Valley. They focus on identifying and representing prime infill development opportunities in rapidly growing submarkets like Cathedral City, which is currently undergoing a major development renaissance.

The firm facilitates institutional-grade multi-family offerings, such as The Jasper, leveraging their deep local knowledge of Riverside County to connect investors with high-potential residential projects near major economic drivers like the Agua Caliente Casino and new retail hubs.

items.text: Primary focus on the Coachella Valley and Riverside County markets.
Specializes in rare infill properties in high-growth downtown areas.
Expertise in Qualified Opportunity Zone (QOZ) tax-advantaged projects.
Targets multi-family assets in markets with low rental vacancy (2.4%).

partners.name: Hoffman Company — Brokerage & Advisory
description: Exclusive listing agent and firm representing the project developer.

whyItMatters: Local presence in Palm Springs ensures direct oversight of the Cathedral City market.
Access to rare infill projects that are often unavailable in broader market listings.

advantages.title: Deep Coachella Valley Presence
advantages.description: The Hoffman Company maintains a dedicated Coachella Valley office in Palm Springs, providing boots-on-the-ground intelligence in the Cathedral City and Rancho Mirage submarkets.

advantages.title: Opportunity Zone Specialization
advantages.description: The sponsor identifies rare infill locations within state-designated Qualified Opportunity Zones, providing potential capital gains tax savings for investors.

advantages.title: Institutional Real Estate Platform
advantages.description: The Hoffman Company leverages an institutional-grade platform with a specific focus on land and multi-family development opportunities in high-growth California counties.
